# Engineering Principles

Our engineering work rests on three pillars:

1. **Simplicity over cleverness** — code is read more than it's written.
2. **Observability first** — you can't fix what you can't see.
3. **Small reversible changes** — prefer many small PRs to one big-bang deploy (Agile).

See also [[projects/platform-refresh]] and the [backlog](../projects/infra-backlog.md).
